executives.name: Lip-Bu Tan
executives.background: Lip-Bu Tan has been a director since 2022. He is Chairman of Walden International and was formerly CEO and Executive Chairman of Cadence Design Systems, Inc.

executives.name: Moshe Gavrielov
executives.background: Moshe Gavrielov is an Independent Director. He was the President and CEO of Xilinx, Inc. from 2008 to 2018. He has over 40 years of experience in the semiconductor industry, including roles at Cadence Design Systems and LSI Logic.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors
